recommendations.title: Winter on Fire: Ukraine's Fight for Freedom
recommendations.overview: Over 93 days in Ukraine, what started as peaceful student demonstrations became a violent revolution and full-fledged civil rights movement.

recommendations.title: Seaspiracy
recommendations.overview: Passionate about ocean life, a filmmaker sets out to document the harm that humans do to marine species — and uncovers an alarming global conspiracy.

recommendations.title: Shawn Mendes: In Wonder
recommendations.overview: A portrait of singer-songwriter Shawn Mendes' life, chronicling the past few years of his rise and journey.

recommendations.title: Moonage Daydream
recommendations.overview: A cinematic odyssey featuring never-before-seen footage exploring David Bowie's creative and musical journey.

recommendations.title: Let It Be
recommendations.overview: A documentary chronicling the Beatles' rehearsal sessions in January 1969 for their proposed "back to basics" album, "Get Back," later re-envisioned and released as "Let It Be."

recommendations.title: The True Cost
recommendations.overview: Film from Andrew Morgan.  The True Cost is a documentary film exploring the impact of fashion on people and the planet.

recommendations.title: Avicii: True Stories
recommendations.overview: Documentary about the arena-packing Swedish DJ, chronicling his explosive rise to fame and surprising decision to retire from live performances in 2016.

recommendations.title: Suffragette
recommendations.overview: Based on true events about the foot soldiers of the early feminist movement, women who were forced underground to pursue a dangerous game of cat and mouse with an increasingly brutal State.

recommendations.title: Andre the Giant
recommendations.overview: An ambitious and wide-ranging documentary exploring Andre’s upbringing in France, his celebrated career in WWE, and his forays in the entertainment world.

recommendations.title: Nude
recommendations.overview: NUDE explores perceptions of nudity in art by chronicling the creative process of photographer David Bellemere as he's commissioned by NU Muses founder Steve Shaw to shoot a fine art calendar of nude photographs.
